message:
feat(atc): add effect semantics enforcement — preconditions, cooldown, escalation, and semantic messages (br-0qt6e.2.7)

New atc_effect_semantics.rs module implementing:
- EffectRiskClass: 3-tier classification (nudge/check/intervention) with
  per-tier repetition limits and safe-mode suppression rules
- validate_preconditions(): runtime safety gate for each effect family
  with structured failure reporting (6 families, 4+ checks each)
- CooldownTracker: deduplication enforcement with per-family window
  limits (3 for nudges, 1 for checks, 0 for interventions)
- EscalationState: advisory→probe→release ladder with configurable
  thresholds (3 unanswered advisories → probe, 2 probes → release)
- build_semantic_message(): structured message rendering with evidence,
  action, remediation, and escalation sections
- EFFECT_UTILITY_MODELS: canonical utility/success/harm definitions for
  all 6 effect families with optimization targets
- Noise suppression: per-agent advisory limits and global toast rate caps
- 40 passing unit tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
